Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Hurry, {f 4 2}-kun! I'm dying from hunger here![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Well, look who it is. I knew you sounded familiar.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I'd recognize that shrill, grating voice anywhere. I mean, who wouldn't?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I don't have all the free time in the world like you high school kids, so let's try to keep this short.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}My son gave you money that was supposed to pay for his cram school. I'd appreciate it if you'd give it back.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Let's just be done with this. I won't bother you again if you return the money now. Are we good?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Um, look sir, I don't think you have the full picture here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 116 3 25 25}Your son said he hates cram school! That's why he was hiding in the park by himself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I was doing him a favor! If anything, you should be thanking me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}S-See? {f 4 2}-kun thinks so, too! ...In his heart, I hope.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Well, what's this? Someone sure is bold today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}You sure you're not gonna start screaming "emergency" and run away?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}My, my, you really don't have a clue, do you? No wonder you don't understand how your son feels![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 116 1 25 25}Besides, haven't you heard? {f 4 2}-kun's my bodyguard now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Suemitsu seems to trust[n]me with all his heart.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Look, I should be the one forgiving you. And even if I did, there's no way you're getting into Paradise.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}People like my dead brother, nonbelievers like you—you're not welcome there![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Talking to you gives me a headache.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}You know my son, right? He's still in elementary school, and yet he has a better head on his shoulders than you do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Your parents have my sympathy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}I'd be ashamed if my son were as neck deep in this cult as you are.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Wh-What... What did you just say to me!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}So that's how it is, huh!? You're just like the rest of them! You think I should've died instead, don't you!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}You don't think I'll ever hold a candle to my twin brother, do you!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Kn-Knock it off! Damn kid...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}God, this has been such a waste of time. Fine, if that's how you want to play, then just you wait and see![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Better watch yourself, kid. Hang around this guy for too long, and he'll scam you, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}I tell my son the same thing—choose your friends carefully.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Come back when you've learned a little respect! ...Ah, actually, don't come back! Ever![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}We won! We fought that guy off! As long as you're here, I've got nothing to fear![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Oh, right! I was dying of hunger, wasn't I? Come on, {f 4 2}-kun![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After eating with Suemitsu,[n]I went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
